title: IC Memo Sub-Agent Output (v1)
description: Structured output from the ic_memo sub-agent — synthesizes the four specialist outputs (literature/competitive/regulatory_history/options_microstructure) plus the Stage 9 thesis into an investment-committee-ready memo. Persisted as fda_agent_reviews row with agent_kind='ic_memo'. Hard-validated; failure → failed_reactor_events with source='sub_agent.ic_memo'.

headline.description: One-sentence framing of the investment thesis.

core_claim.description: 2-3 sentences naming the asymmetry and the trigger.

skew.description: Qualitative read of the upside/downside ratio.

implied_move_vs_options.description: How the thesis upside compares to the straddle-implied move.

trigger.description: Concrete, observable event that would falsify the thesis.

rationale.description: Why this trigger materially invalidates the thesis.

source.description: Which specialist the trigger surfaced from (or 'synthesis' if cross-cutting).

recommended_band.description: Sizing band tied to conviction × asymmetry × liquidity.

rationale.description: How conviction, asymmetry, and microstructure liquidity combined to produce the band.

summary.description: Operator-facing prose summary suitable for the IC panel header (D-111 §2). Renders inline on the dashboard.

key_findings.description: Bullet-style claims, each citing the supporting specialist via [literature], [competitive], etc.

uncertainties.description: Open questions where the synthesis is exposed.

confidence.description: 0-1 self-rated confidence in the synthesis quality (separate from thesis conviction).
